name: Starts Publishing Corporation
summary: Starts Publishing Corporation engages in the publishing business in Japan. It publishes women's magazines, such as Oz magazine, Oz magazine trip, Metro Minutes, and Aerde; and offers event planning and management services. The company also operates Ozmall website; SCR based on know-how cultivated as a publisher; and novel posting sites comprising Noichigo and Berry's Caf√É¬©, as well as publishes books, e-books, and comics. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
